digest.title: Amazon CEO's talks with U.S. officials triggered crackdown on Anthropic models
Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
digest.tldr: According to the Wall Street Journal, the export control directive that led to Anthropic cutting off access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 was triggered in part by cybersecurity research from Amazon and conversations between…

digest.title: Anthropic cuts off Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access following government order
digest.tldr: On Friday evening, the government ordered Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all foreign nations, both inside and outside the US, due to national security concerns.  That order included employees of…
